'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 46''' was the forty-sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[November 13]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|The Rescue of Princess Leia]]
*[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]
*[[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Jamillia/Legends|Jamillia]]
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*The [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]]
*[[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] - [[Yoda's Hut/Legends|Yoda's Hut]]
*[[Hologlide J57 cam droid/Legends|Podrace Cam Droid]]
*[[Holocron/Legends|Holocrons]]
*[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class Imperial Shuttle]]
